title: Il medico e lo stregone
writer: Ennio De Concini, Luigi Emmanuele, Agenore Incrocci
actors: Vittorio De Sica, Marcello Mastroianni, Marisa Merlini
plot: Francesco, a young doctor, is appointed doctor to the imaginary village of Pianetta in the province of Avellino, but is immediately in competition with Don Antonio, a so-called "healer".
